allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9090 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "\(New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\).ConnectAsync\('localhost',9090\).Wait\(500\); Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9090 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess")
Bash(mysql -h localhost -u root -proot -e "USE predictive_maintenance; DESCRIBE app_users;")
Bash(mysql -h localhost -u root -proot -e "USE predictive_maintenance; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS user_count FROM app_users;")
